title: moraea zeyheri
intro: Moraea zeyheri, also known as the yellow river lily or Zeyher's moraea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is native to southern Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other ailments, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Moraea zeyheri is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its dried roots and leaves can be used in teas, tinctures, or other medicinal concoctions.
